banner.title: Become a ThePrimeWay ambassador
banner.subtitle: Share ThePrimeWay with your audience and earn recurring commissions for every user you bring. The more paid referrals you attract, the higher your tier and your %.
banner.perk1Desc: Every month your referral pays, you earn
banner.perk2Desc: Bronze → Silver → Gold → Platinum. Up to 30%

form.title: Apply as ambassador
form.description: Tell us about you and your audience. We review every application manually.
form.motivation: Why do you want to be an ambassador? (min 100 chars)
form.motivationPlaceholder: Tell us what connects you to ThePrimeWay and how you plan to share it...
form.terms: I accept the ambassador program terms: recurring commissions while the referral keeps paying, no clawback in MVP, possible suspension for fraud or spam.
form.submitted: Application sent. We'll notify you by email and notification.

pending.title: Application under review
pending.message: We're reviewing your application. Usually takes 1-3 days. We'll notify you by email and notification when there's a response.

rejected.title: Application not approved
rejected.retry: You'll be able to reapply after 30 days.

approved.title: You're an ambassador
approved.subtitle: Share your code and start earning recurring commissions.

dashboard.title: Ambassador dashboard
dashboard.noReferralsYet: No referrals yet. Share your link to start earning.
